recent_tools.name: Write
recent_tools.output:
"""Graphviz-based mindmap renderer.

Converts NotebookLM mindmap JSON to professional recruiter-ready PNGs
using Graphviz DOT format with custom styling.

Requirements:
    - Graphviz installed: https://graphviz.org/download/
    - Python graphviz library: pip install graphviz
"""

from asyncio import run as asyncio_run
from dataclasses import dataclass
from pathlib import Path
from typing import TYPE_CHECKING

if TYPE_CHECKING:
    from graphviz import Digraph

    from media_pipeline.providers.notebooklm import NotebookLMClient


class GraphvizRendererError(Exception):
    """Graphviz renderer errors."""

    def __init__(self, message: str, install_help: str | None = None) -> None:
        super().__init__(message)
        self.install_help = install_help


@dataclass
class GraphvizTheme:
    """Theme configuration for mindmap rendering.

    Attributes:
        bg_color: Background color (hex or name).
        font_name: Font family name.
        font_size: Base font size in points.
        root_color: Root node color (fill).
        root_font_color: Root node text color.
        level_colors: List of colors for hierarchy levels (fill).
        edge_color: Edge/connection line color.
        edge_style: Edge style (solid, dashed, dotted).
        shape: Node shape (box, ellipse, circle, none).
        dpi: Output resolution (dots per inch).
    """

    bg_color: str = "transparent"
    font_name: str = "Arial"
    font_size: int = 14
    root_color: str = "#4A90E2"  # Professional blue
    root_font_color: str = "#FFFFFF"  # White text on blue
    level_colors: list[str] | None = None
    edge_color: str = "#555555"  # Dark gray
    edge_style: str = "solid"
    shape: str = "box"  # Boxy, professional look
    dpi: int = 150  # High resolution for crisp output


class GraphvizMindmapRenderer:
    """Render NotebookLM mindmaps to recruiter-ready PNGs using Graphviz.

    Example:
        >>> renderer = GraphvizMindmapRenderer()
        >>> png_path = renderer.r
